MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul E. Rice, Esq., 650/289-9088, for defendants Quantum Aircraft Service, American Aircraft Consulting, Inc. and David Ungemach, moving to quash service of summons or stay or dismiss this action
Peter M. Bransten, Esq. of PILLSBURY WINTHROP 983-1395, for plaintiff and opposing party Atel Capital Equipment Corp.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court took DEFENDANTS QUANTUM AIRCRAFT SERVICE, American Aircraft Consulting, Inc. and David Ungemach's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY this action under submission. (REQ/301/CW) Reporter: Beldon Yee CSR #2647
